conservative.name: Fight-Fight!
conservative.requirements: Skaven allies within medium range engaged in combat

success.description: You gnash your teeth and shriek in Queekish. While this action recharges, Skaven allies within medium range gain the Inspired condition
As above, and skaven allies within medium range gain 2 Aggression dice

boon.description: Enemies within close range of you gain the Rattled condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: Skaven within medium range gain the Cowed condition for 2 rounds

reckless.name: Fight-Fight!
reckless.requirements: Skaven allies within medium range and engaged in combat

success.description: You gnash your teeth and shriek in Queekish. Enemies within medium range of you gain the Rattled condition for 2 rounds

boon.description: Skaven allies within medium range gain the Inspired condition for 2 rounds
Skaven allies within medium range gain 2 Aggression dice

bane.description: Skaven within medium range gain the Cowed condition for 2 rounds
